other_findings: Pro-B cells represent an intermediate B cell developmental stage in fetal skin
Characterized by VDJ heavy chain rearrangement
Express increasing levels of B cell transcripts compared to pre-pro-B cells
Pro/pre-B cell clusters have high nuclear to cytoplasmic ratio, immature chromatin and nucleoli (Popescu et al., 2019)
Differentially regulated genes in the HSC/MPP to B cell transition include SPIB, SP100 and CTSS
evidence_quotes: 'Pro/pre-B' cell clusters have high nuclear to cytoplasmic ratio, immature chromatin and nucleoli
Differentially regulated genes in the HSC/MPPs to B cell transition include SPIB, SP100 and CTSS
